variables.notes: Use Insurance Revenue as primary top-line. Total Revenue is a fallback because it appears to be the broader reported revenue line and may capture older presentation differences.

No candidate list was provided. For an insurer, Insurance Service Expenses is the closest analogue to direct cost of sales/COGS in recent years. Older years may instead use claims-related presentation such as Claims Incurred, so this mapping may need insurer-specific review.

candidates.why: Overhead personnel cost component, but only visible for older year(s).
